verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I look up to the mountains Does my strength come from the mountains? No, my strength comes from God Who made heaven, and earth, and the mountains

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: When confusion's my companion And despair holds me for ransom I will feel no fear I know that You are near

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: When I'm caught deep in the valley With chaos for my company I'll find my comfort here ‘Cause I know that You are near

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: My help comes from You You're right here, pulling me through You carry my weakness, my sickness, my brokenness all on Your shoulders Your shoulders

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: My help comes from You You are my rest, my rescue I don't have to see to believe that You're lifting me up on Your shoulders Your shoulders

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: You mend what once was shattered And You turn my tears to laughter Your forgiveness is my fortress Oh Your mercy is relentless

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: My help comes from You You're right here, pulling me through You carry my weakness, my sickness, my brokenness all on Your shoulders Your shoulders

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: My help comes from You You are my rest, my rescue I don't have to see to believe that You're lifting me up on Your shoulders Your shoulders

verse.name: v9
verse.lines: /: My help is from You Don't have to see it to believe it My help is from you Don't have to see it, ‘cause I know, ‘cause I know it's true :/

verse.name: v10
verse.lines: My help comes from You You're right here, pulling me through You carry my weakness, my sickness, my brokenness all on Your shoulders Your shoulders

verse.name: v11
verse.lines: My help comes from You You are my rest, my rescue I don't have to see to believe that You're lifting me up on Your shoulders Your shoulders

verse.name: v12
verse.lines: /: My help is from You Don't have to see it to believe it My help is from you Don't have to see it, ‘cause I know, ‘cause I know it's true :/ 4x
